text: Typical German dishes include Kartoffelsalat, Sauerkraut, Bratwurst, Schnitzel, Spätzle, Sauerbraten, Eintopf, Brezeln, and regional potato-based meals.
A vegan Kartoffelsalat can be prepared with potatoes, onion, vegetable broth, vinegar, mustard, plant oil, salt, pepper, and fresh herbs.
A multimodal RAG pipeline converts images, audio, PDFs, video, Markdown, and CSV files into text before chunking, embedding, and vector database storage.
Common Italian dishes include pasta, risotto, minestrone, bruschetta, focaccia, gnocchi, and tiramisu. This is a contrasting sample for retrieval testing.
